reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+run, first-visit + cached auto-init, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 2

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/chinese-bert-fill-mask/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/chinese-bert-fill-mask/mobile.png

Agent verdict — REAL WASM run (Xenova/bert-base-chinese, AutoModelForMaskedLM): '北京是中国的[MASK]都。' → 首 (→ 首都 'capital'), logits tensor [1,11,21128], 78 ms, 11-char token strip rendered. Ladder confirmed real char output: wild '画蛇添[MASK]，多此一举。' → 足; practical typo-check '[MASK]每天…' → 我 (他 ranked #2); confusable '他跑[MASK]很快。' → 得 86.35% > 的 13% > 地 0.06%; multi-model chain → 'Beijing is the capital of China.' Correct shape + semantics, not fake. | conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual.

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 5✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — declares-model-id=pass, declares-task=pass, declares-backend=pass, declares-quantisation=pass, inference-off-main-thread=pass. At-a-glance links Xenova/bert-base-chinese, states fill-mask · WASM · q8 · character-level.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~103 MB)'; after load the shared loader auto-inits to 'Model ready' with a 'Clear cached model' control; a returning visit (same profile) auto-inits from the transformers.js cache with NO Load click (buttons: ['Clear cached model']) and re-runs the sample. | conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.

Agent verdict — streamed download progress on first load; Retry surfaced on failure by the shared loader; a live #runStatus region reports 'add a [MASK]' / prediction errors; offline reuse via the transformers.js cache. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU); headless no-GPU run produced real Chinese fills. | conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Agent verdict — sentence input, Chinese sample chips, Insert-[MASK] button, top-k slider, clickable prediction rows, the practical clickable-character proofreader + confusable chooser, and the multi-model Fill&translate button all operable and keyboard-accessible; verified headless across all five pages. | conformance: controls-operable=manual.

Agent verdict — predictions + logits are produced by the on-device AutoModelForMaskedLM run (real output samples recorded above); the multi-model rung translates the literally filled-in Chinese sentence via a second on-device MarianMT model. No canned result anywhere. | conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. role=status aria-live #runStatus + loader status; labelled input + slider; prediction rows and per-character proofreading chips are keyboard-activatable buttons with aria-labels.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280 and mobile 360×740 DPR3 both render with no horizontal overflow (measured 0px), legible Hànzì (larger font), wrapped at-a-glance table, [MASK] shown as code, chips flex-wrap, the character strip wraps, and the prediction grid collapses (logit column hidden) under 560px; light + dark screenshots reviewed (reports/responsive/screens/chinese-bert-fill-mask/). | conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

Agent verdict — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 21k vocab runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms) so it never triggers a blocking run; the translator runs in its own worker. Main thread stays responsive; 0 console errors across all pages. | conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep INP low — keep heavy JS off the interaction path.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 21,128-character vocabulary runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: 78 ms fill in the worker, page responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is off the main thread (worker.js runs AutoModelForMaskedLM; a second worker runs MarianMT translation); the UI only renders returned results.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports; let content wrap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample chips, a wrapping character strip, and a prediction grid that collapses columns (hides the logit column) under 560px; at-a-glance table wraps.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-mobile=pass at 360px; measured 0px horizontal overflow; mobile screenshot reviewed

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels; don't rely on placeholder.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the sentence <input> has an associated <label>; the top-k slider is labelled; sample/confusable chips are real buttons in labelled groups.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic errors in an aria-live region on the page, not only the console.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus reports 'add a [MASK]' and prediction/translation failures with an .err class.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region; keyboard-operable.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — labelled controls, prediction rows and per-character proofreading chips are keyboard-activatable buttons with aria-labels, live status region.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for chinese-bert-fill-mask (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for chinese-bert-fill-mask: real ~103 MB download + on-device run verified in headless Chrome (first-visit Download → '北京是中国的首都。' with 首 at 78 ms WASM, 11-char token strip; cached auto-init with only a Clear-cache button; all four ladder pages produce real Chinese output — wild chengyu '画蛇添足', practical proofreading + confusable 得>的>地, multi-model fill→translate 'Beijing is the capital of China.'). Light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0px overflow, legible Hànzì, operable controls). Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass (14/14 tested); manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
